title: FlightChangeReplan
description: Orchestrator response shape consumed by the phone-frame UI. Matches the RePlan TypeScript type in frontend/src/types.ts.

headline.description: One-line summary of the disruption and the re-plan outcome.

weather.description: Compact weather line for the new arrival window at the destination.

itineraryShifts.description: Proposed shifted itinerary items, ordered by time.

time.description: Local time of the slot, e.g. '15:00'.

note.description: Short rationale, e.g. 'moved from 09:00 to 15:00 due to delay'.

agentSteps.description: Optional. Per-agent step trail surfaced to the UI as the orchestrator runs.
